evals.prompt: Clean the main transcript at runs/demo/providers/deepgram/transcription.txt using every other providers/*/transcription.txt file as evidence. Preserve timestamps and speaker labels.
evals.expected_output: A cleaned version of the main transcript with timestamps and speaker-label formatting preserved, all alternate provider transcripts read, and a report listing unresolved unclear passages.
assertions: Every timestamp from the original transcript is present in the output
Speaker labels are preserved without added markdown emphasis
The report lists which alternate transcript files were read
The report states how many [unclear] markers existed and how many were resolved
No substantive claims were added or removed

evals.prompt: This transcript has several [unclear] markers and I have alternate provider transcripts in the same run directory. Resolve whatever you can without changing the speaker's meaning.
evals.expected_output: Each [unclear] marker is checked against all alternates, plausible readings are inserted, and any remaining [unclear] markers are justified as unresolved across every provider.
assertions: Every [unclear] marker in the original was evaluated against all available alternates
Resolved markers were replaced with plausible text, not left as gaps
Any remaining [unclear] markers include justification that all providers failed at that point
The report includes a count of resolved vs. unresolved markers

evals.prompt: Polish this pasted voice-note transcript for readability. It has no timestamps and one speaker. Do not summarize it.
evals.expected_output: Readable paragraph-form transcript text with duplicate words, obvious filler, punctuation, capitalization, and grammar cleaned while preserving the original meaning and uncertainty.
assertions: Output is paragraph-form prose, not bulleted or listed
Duplicate words like 'the the' are removed
Filler words like 'um' and 'uh' are removed
Hedges like 'I think' and 'maybe' are preserved when they affect meaning
No summarization occurred -- all original ideas are present in order
